_publications._publicationTitle: Neuronal hyperexcitability drives central and peripheral nervous system tumor progression in models of neurofibromatosis-1.

_contextSnippet: RAS-GTP levels were increased by 2.3–2.7-fold in Nf1 +/1809 RGC and hippocampal neurons relative to WT controls, similar to Nf1 +/neo neurons
resourceName: Nf1 c.5425 C > T ; Arg1809Cys-mutant mice
details: Nf1 +/1809 neurons had elevated RAS activity (2.3-2.7-fold increase) similar to Nf1 +/neo neurons, but did not exhibit increased midkine or COL1A2 expression
